ddls:
CREATE TABLE "size_reference" (
  "size_ref_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size reference entry */,
  "product_category" TEXT /* Category of the product (e.g., TOP, BOTTOM, OUTERWEAR) */,
  "size_code" TEXT /* Size code (e.g., XS/S, M, L, XL, XXL) */,
  "it_size" TEXT /* Size in Italy */,
  "uk_size" TEXT /* Size in the United Kingdom */,
  "us_size" TEXT /* Size in the United States */,
  "fr_sp_size" TEXT /* Size in France and Spain */,
  "ger_size" TEXT /* Size in Germany */,
  "ru_size" TEXT /* Size in Russia */,
  "shoulders_cm" TEXT /* Shoulder measurement in centimeters */,
  "chest_cm" TEXT /* Chest measurement in centimeters */,
  "waist_cm" TEXT /* Waist measurement in centimeters */,
  "hip_cm" TEXT /* Hip measurement in centimeters */,
  "sleeve_length_cm" TEXT /* Sleeve length measurement in centimeters */,
  "length_cm" TEXT /* Length measurement in centimeters */,
  "shoulder_to_shoulder_cm" TEXT /* Shoulder-to-shoulder measurement in centimeters */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the size reference data */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the entry */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who last updated the entry */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the size reference is currently active */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the size reference was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_ref_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_reference_it_size FOREIGN KEY ("it_size") REFERENCES regions ("region_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_reference_fr_sp_size FOREIGN KEY ("fr_sp_size") REFERENCES regions ("region_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_reference_us_size FOREIGN KEY ("us_size") REFERENCES regions ("region_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_reference_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_reference_uk_size FOREIGN KEY ("uk_size") REFERENCES regions ("region_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_reference_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_reference_product_category FOREIGN KEY ("product_category") REFERENCES product_categories ("category_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_reference_ger_size FOREIGN KEY ("ger_size") REFERENCES regions ("region_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_reference_size_code FOREIGN KEY ("size_code") REFERENCES size_codes ("size_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_reference_ru_size FOREIGN KEY ("ru_size") REFERENCES regions ("region_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the product category (e.g., TOP, BOTTOM, OUTERWEAR) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product category */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the product category is currently active */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the category */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who last updated the category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the category was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_codes" (
  "size_code_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size code */,
  "size_code" TEXT /* Size code (e.g., XS/S, M, L, XL, XXL) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the size code */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the size code is currently active */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the size code */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who last updated the size code */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the size code was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the size code was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_code_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_code" TEXT /* Code of the region (e.g., IT, UK, US, FR-SP, GER, RU) */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region (e.g., Italy, United Kingdom, United States) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region and its sizing standards */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the region is currently active */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the region */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who last updated the region */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the region was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the region was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, designer, customer) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the user account is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
